## [00:00 - 00:20]

Okay, trying to move into that proposal phase and all of a sudden you hear, hey, we've got to slow down here. Sir, forgive me. I just thought that what we picked out for you was right for you and I thought you wanted me to show you what we could do for you with regards to the cost of it. Don't you want me to do that for you? Follow me.
